title: fix: align key modal blue styling
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A fresh coat of blue paint
gist.blurb: We've polished up the API key dialogs with a soothing new blue color palette. Managing your keys just got a little easier on the eyes.
gist.summary: Aligned the styling of API key creation, editing, and deletion dialogs to match the dashboard's cohesive blue palette.
gist.impact: Users will experience a cleaner, more consistent interface when managing their API keys and permissions.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a painter, painting a giant golden key with soft blue paint to represent the UI color alignment for API keys.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, using a brush to paint a giant golden key with soft pastel blue paint. A chunky retro monitor in the background displays a clean blue user interface. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel blue gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
